overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration through a foggy industrial outskirts. The player ascends a dirt embankment past a massive rotating holographic billboard, observes an aerial vehicle flying overhead, and approaches a highway overpass with neon-lit structures and distant city lights visible through the haze.

agents.ego_description: walking up a dirt slope toward a large illuminated holographic billboard structure

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running along the left side of the path
massive rotating cylindrical advertising tower with glowing neon displays
metal fence with yellow industrial signage blocking off areas
tall electrical pole with wires stretching across the scene

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial embankment at night. The player ascends a dirt slope flanked by a concrete retaining wall on the left and a massive rotating holographic billboard tower visible on the right. Sparse vegetation and chain-link fencing line the path as the camera moves steadily forward through the hazy neon-lit environment.

events.description: aerial vehicle with glowing red lights enters the sky and flies overhead
aerial vehicle exits the frame continuing toward the distant city

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while observing the aerial vehicle passing overhead

notable_agents.action: flying overhead in a curved trajectory from left to right

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure with streetlights spanning across the horizon
small dilapidated wooden building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: As the player reaches the top of the embankment, an aerial vehicle with glowing lights flies overhead from left to right. The highway overpass becomes visible in the distance, while the holographic billboard now dominates the right side of the frame. A small wooden shack appears on the right as the camera continues moving forward through the open industrial lot.

events.description: passing under the concrete highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the concrete highway overpass through the supporting pillars

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars and streetlights
two-story industrial structure with metal railings and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and passes beneath the massive concrete highway overpass, entering a darker, sheltered area. The industrial building on the right features metal railings and glowing windows. The holographic billboard and wooden shack disappear behind as the camera moves through the concrete support pillars, with the overpass structure now dominating overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with distant city skyline

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open area with view of distant illuminated city

agents.ego_description: moving through open industrial area toward distant illuminated skyscrapers

entered.detail: foggy skyline with illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance
pair of tall rectangular digital billboards displaying advertisements
derelict car parked near the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass, the scene opens into a wide industrial yard. The distant city skyline becomes visible through the fog, featuring illuminated skyscrapers and tall advertising towers. An abandoned vehicle sits on the left as the player continues forward through the open dirt area toward the glowing metropolis in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy industrial embankment toward a distant, glowing metropolis. It begins with a steady ascent up a dirt slope flanked by a concrete wall and a massive rotating holographic billboard tower that casts a neon glow through the haze. As the camera reaches the top of the embankment, an aerial vehicle with glowing lights streaks overhead, leading the view past a small wooden shack toward a looming highway overpass. The scene then shifts into a darker, sheltered space as the camera passes beneath the massive concrete pillars of the overpass, leaving the billboard and shack behind. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a wide industrial yard, passing an abandoned vehicle as the fog parts to reveal a skyline of illuminated skyscrapers and advertising towers in the distance.
